title: Kubernetes api-server timeout after upgrade
text: After upgrading the production cluster to Kubernetes 1.28, the api-server started returning timeout errors during readiness checks. The incident affected internal deployments in prod. Restarting the control plane did not help, but rolling back the api-server image resolved the issue.
original_text: After upgrading the production cluster to Kubernetes 1.28, the api-server started returning timeout errors during readiness checks. The incident affected internal deployments in prod. Restarting the control plane did not help, but rolling back the api-server image resolved the issue.

snapshot.description: Default IT terminology profile snapshot for SkeinRank demo and local runtime.

title: CrashLoopBackOff in payment service
text: The payment service entered CrashLoopBackOff in the prod namespace after a Helm release. Logs showed an invalid environment variable in the deployment manifest. Reapplying the chart with the corrected config fixed the issue.
original_text: The payment service entered CrashLoopBackOff in the prod namespace after a Helm release. Logs showed an invalid environment variable in the deployment manifest. Reapplying the chart with the corrected config fixed the issue.

title: Postgres latency spike in eu-west-1
text: A latency spike was observed on the Postgres primary in eu-west-1. Application requests from the billing service slowed down significantly. The issue was linked to storage IOPS saturation during a backup window.
original_text: A latency spike was observed on the Postgres primary in eu-west-1. Application requests from the billing service slowed down significantly. The issue was linked to storage IOPS saturation during a backup window.

title: Redis connection reset during failover
text: During a Redis failover, several workers reported connection reset errors. The problem lasted for two minutes and mostly affected cache-heavy endpoints. Increasing retry backoff reduced the impact.
original_text: During a Redis failover, several workers reported connection reset errors. The problem lasted for two minutes and mostly affected cache-heavy endpoints. Increasing retry backoff reduced the impact.

title: Terraform apply failed for EKS node group
text: Terraform apply failed while updating the EKS node group in staging. The plan referenced an outdated launch template version. After refreshing the state and re-running apply, the node group update succeeded.
original_text: Terraform apply failed while updating the EKS node group in staging. The plan referenced an outdated launch template version. After refreshing the state and re-running apply, the node group update succeeded.

title: Nginx ingress returns 504 gateway timeout
text: The Nginx ingress in production started returning 504 gateway timeout for the checkout endpoint. Upstream pods were healthy, but the proxy read timeout was too low for long-running requests.
original_text: The Nginx ingress in production started returning 504 gateway timeout for the checkout endpoint. Upstream pods were healthy, but the proxy read timeout was too low for long-running requests.

title: Certificate signed by unknown authority in kubectl
text: Engineers using kubectl against the shared cluster received certificate signed by unknown authority. The kubeconfig pointed to an old internal CA bundle. Updating the certificate chain fixed cluster access.
original_text: Engineers using kubectl against the shared cluster received certificate signed by unknown authority. The kubeconfig pointed to an old internal CA bundle. Updating the certificate chain fixed cluster access.

title: Prometheus scrape timeout on kube-state-metrics
text: Prometheus reported scrape timeout for kube-state-metrics in the monitoring namespace. The metrics endpoint responded slowly after enabling additional collectors. Reducing scrape pressure restored normal collection.
original_text: Prometheus reported scrape timeout for kube-state-metrics in the monitoring namespace. The metrics endpoint responded slowly after enabling additional collectors. Reducing scrape pressure restored normal collection.

title: ImagePullBackOff after Helm deploy
text: A Helm deploy introduced a wrong image tag for the recommendation service. Pods in staging immediately moved to ImagePullBackOff because the registry did not contain the referenced build.

title: Dotnet service fails with NullReferenceException
text: A dotnet 8 service in prod failed with NullReferenceException after a configuration rollout. The issue occurred only in one region because a required feature flag was missing from the environment settings.
